requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions for Lighting (IMANOR NM adopting CISPR 15 vs CN GB 17743)
requirement_topic.zh: 照明产品 EMC 发射（IMANOR NM 采用 CISPR 15 vs 中国 GB 17743）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明產品 EMC 發射（IMANOR NM 採用 CISPR 15 vs 中國 GB 17743）

summary.en: Morocco controls electromagnetic disturbance from electrical lighting through IMANOR NM standards that adopt the IEC/CISPR series (the lighting EMC emissions reference is CISPR 15, adopted as the corresponding NM standard). For regulated electrical products, compliance evidence is reviewed within the Ministry of Industry import-conformity / attestation process rather than via an EU-style self-declared CE EMC DoC. Conducted emissions on mains terminals (150 kHz to 30 MHz) and radiated emissions are covered. Test evidence from an accredited (ILAC MRA-recognised) laboratory to the CISPR 15-based method is expected; the in-country importer presents this evidence as part of the import-conformity file.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥通过采用 IEC/CISPR 系列的 IMANOR NM 标准控制电气照明的电磁骚扰（照明 EMC 发射参考为 CISPR 15，采纳为对应 NM 标准）。对于受管制电气产品，符合性证据在工业部进口符合性/认证流程中审查，而非通过欧盟式自我声明的 CE EMC 符合性声明。涵盖电源端传导发射（150 kHz 至 30 MHz）及辐射发射。须提供来自认可（ILAC MRA 认可）实验室、依据 CISPR 15 方法的检测证据；在摩进口商将该证据作为进口符合性文件的一部分提交。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥通過採用 IEC/CISPR 系列的 IMANOR NM 標準控制電氣照明的電磁騷擾（照明 EMC 發射參考為 CISPR 15，採納為對應 NM 標準）。對於受管制電氣產品，符合性證據在工業部進口符合性/認證流程中審查，而非通過歐盟式自我聲明的 CE EMC 符合性聲明。涵蓋電源端傳導發射（150 kHz 至 30 MHz）及輻射發射。須提供來自認可（ILAC MRA 認可）實驗室、依據 CISPR 15 方法的檢測證據；在摩進口商將該證據作為進口符合性文件的一部分提交。

standards_or_laws: IMANOR NM standard adopting CISPR 15 — limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment
Ministry of Industry import-conformity / attestation process for regulated electrical products (EMC evidence reviewed within it)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC certification (which covers both safety and EMC for relevant categories). Testing is conducted at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories. The CISPR 15 technical base is shared with the Moroccan NM standard, but the CCC EMC report is presented in the Chinese certification framework, not the Moroccan import-conformity file.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具须符合 GB 17743，这是相关类别 CCC 认证（涵盖安全和 EMC）的组成部分。检测在中国 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室进行。CISPR 15 技术基础与摩洛哥 NM 标准共享，但 CCC EMC 报告在中国认证框架中提交，而非摩洛哥进口符合性文件中。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具須符合 GB 17743，這是相關類別 CCC 認證（涵蓋安全和 EMC）的組成部分。檢測在中國 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室進行。CISPR 15 技術基礎與摩洛哥 NM 標準共享，但 CCC EMC 報告在中國認證框架中提交，而非摩洛哥進口符合性文件中。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: Both the Moroccan NM standard and CN GB 17743 derive from CISPR 15, so emission limits are largely harmonized and the underlying test data may be reusable. The real gaps are procedural and documentary: (1) Morocco reviews EMC evidence inside the Ministry of Industry import-conformity / attestation process via the in-country importer, not via an EU-style self-declared DoC — a CCC certificate alone is not the deliverable; (2) test reports should come from an ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory and be presented to the conformity body in the format the import-conformity scheme expects; (3) Chinese CCC EMC reports are not automatically accepted — confirm whether the report and accreditation scope are recognised for Moroccan import conformity; (4) if the luminaire has wireless functionality, additional radio rules apply through ANRT (see ledma-emc-02).
gap.zh: 摩洛哥 NM 标准与中国 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，故发射限值基本协调，底层检测数据可能可复用。真正的差距在程序与文件层面：（1）摩洛哥在工业部进口符合性/认证流程内、经在摩进口商审查 EMC 证据，而非通过欧盟式自我声明的 DoC——仅有 CCC 证书并非交付物；（2）检测报告应来自 ILAC MRA 认可实验室，并按进口符合性方案所要求的格式提交给合格评定机构；（3）中国 CCC EMC 报告不自动被接受——须确认报告及认可范围是否为摩洛哥进口符合性所认可；（4）若灯具具备无线功能，则通过 ANRT 适用额外无线电规则（见 ledma-emc-02）。
gap.zht: 摩洛哥 NM 標準與中國 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，故發射限值基本協調，底層檢測數據可能可複用。真正的差距在程序與文件層面：（1）摩洛哥在工業部進口符合性/認證流程內、經在摩進口商審查 EMC 證據，而非通過歐盟式自我聲明的 DoC——僅有 CCC 證書並非交付物；（2）檢測報告應來自 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室，並按進口符合性方案所要求的格式提交給合格評定機構；（3）中國 CCC EMC 報告不自動被接受——須確認報告及認可範圍是否為摩洛哥進口符合性所認可；（4）若燈具具備無線功能，則通過 ANRT 適用額外無線電規則（見 ledma-emc-02）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where regulated — for regulated electrical lighting, EMC emissions evidence to the CISPR 15-based NM standard is reviewed within the Ministry of Industry import-conformity / attestation process via the in-country importer
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China

source.publisher: IMANOR — Institut Marocain de Normalisation (Moroccan Institute of Standardisation)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Morocco controls lighting EMC emissions through an IMANOR NM standard adopting CISPR 15, with evidence reviewed inside the Ministry of Industry import-conformity / attestation process via the in-country importer — not via an EU-style self-declared CE EMC DoC. Emission limits are broadly harmonized with CN GB 17743 (both CISPR 15-based), so test data may be reusable, but a CCC certificate alone is not the deliverable: provide ILAC-recognised reports in the format the conformity body expects and confirm acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 摩洛哥通过采用 CISPR 15 的 IMANOR NM 标准控制照明 EMC 发射，证据在工业部进口符合性/认证流程内、经在摩进口商审查——而非通过欧盟式自我声明的 CE EMC 符合性声明。发射限值与中国 GB 17743（均基于 CISPR 15）基本协调，故检测数据可能可复用，但仅有 CCC 证书并非交付物：请按合格评定机构要求的格式提供 ILAC 认可报告并确认其接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 摩洛哥通過採用 CISPR 15 的 IMANOR NM 標準控制照明 EMC 發射，證據在工業部進口符合性/認證流程內、經在摩進口商審查——而非通過歐盟式自我聲明的 CE EMC 符合性聲明。發射限值與中國 GB 17743（均基於 CISPR 15）基本協調，故檢測數據可能可複用，但僅有 CCC 證書並非交付物：請按合格評定機構要求的格式提供 ILAC 認可報告並確認其接受。

requirement_topic.en: Radio / Wireless Type Approval for Smart Luminaires (ANRT vs CN SRRC)
requirement_topic.zh: 智能灯具的无线电/无线型号核准（ANRT vs 中国 SRRC）
requirement_topic.zht: 智能燈具的無線電/無線型號核准（ANRT vs 中國 SRRC）

summary.en: LED luminaires with wireless functionality (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee, RF remote dimming) require radio type approval / agreement from ANRT (Agence Nationale de Reglementation des Telecommunications) before being placed on the Moroccan market. ANRT controls the equipment-approval regime for radio-frequency devices, including frequency-band conformity, and works with the import-conformity process so that non-approved radio equipment can be blocked at import. This is a distinct, additional approval beyond the lighting safety and EMC-emissions evidence: a smart luminaire needs both the electrical/lighting conformity and the ANRT radio approval. Purely passive (non-wireless) luminaires do not trigger ANRT approval.
summary.zh: 具备无线功能（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee、射频遥控调光）的 LED 灯具在投放摩洛哥市场前须取得国家电信监管局（ANRT，Agence Nationale de Reglementation des Telecommunications）的无线电型号核准/许可。ANRT 管理射频设备的设备核准制度，包括频段符合性，并配合进口符合性流程，使未经核准的无线电设备可在进口环节被拦截。这是在照明安全与 EMC 发射证据之外的独立额外核准：智能灯具既需要电气/照明符合性，也需要 ANRT 无线电核准。纯被动（无无线）灯具不触发 ANRT 核准。
summary.zht: 具備無線功能（Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee、射頻遙控調光）的 LED 燈具在投放摩洛哥市場前須取得國家電信監管局（ANRT，Agence Nationale de Reglementation des Telecommunications）的無線電型號核准/許可。ANRT 管理射頻設備的設備核准制度，包括頻段符合性，並配合進口符合性流程，使未經核准的無線電設備可在進口環節被攔截。這是在照明安全與 EMC 發射證據之外的獨立額外核准：智能燈具既需要電氣/照明符合性，也需要 ANRT 無線電核准。純被動（無無線）燈具不觸發 ANRT 核准。

standards_or_laws: ANRT — Agence Nationale de Reglementation des Telecommunications: radio equipment approval / agrement regime for radio-frequency devices in Morocco
Moroccan telecommunications law governing the use and approval of radio equipment (frequency-band conformity)

summary.en: China's equivalent is SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval, which is mandatory for radio-transmitting equipment sold in China, including wireless-enabled smart luminaires. SRRC approval certifies frequency-band and transmit-power conformity to Chinese radio rules and is administered separately from CCC safety/EMC certification. SRRC approval is China-specific and is not recognised by ANRT — frequency allocations and approval procedures differ between the two countries.
summary.zh: 中国对应制度为国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）型号核准，对在中国销售的无线电发射设备（包括具备无线功能的智能灯具）为强制要求。SRRC 核准认证频段及发射功率符合中国无线电规则，与 CCC 安全/EMC 认证分开管理。SRRC 核准为中国特有，不被 ANRT 认可——两国的频率分配及核准程序不同。
summary.zht: 中國對應制度為國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）型號核准，對在中國銷售的無線電發射設備（包括具備無線功能的智能燈具）為強制要求。SRRC 核准認證頻段及發射功率符合中國無線電規則，與 CCC 安全/EMC 認證分開管理。SRRC 核准為中國特有，不被 ANRT 認可——兩國的頻率分配及核准程序不同。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled equipment (including smart luminaires) sold in China

gap.en: A Chinese smart luminaire holding SRRC approval still needs separate ANRT approval for Morocco — the two regimes are not mutually recognised and frequency allocations differ. Gaps: (1) ANRT radio approval is a distinct mandatory step in addition to the lighting safety and EMC-emissions evidence; (2) the radio module's operating bands and transmit power must conform to Moroccan frequency allocations, which the manufacturer should confirm before relying on the same module configuration used for China; (3) ANRT approval is typically arranged through the in-country importer / a local representative, who handles the application and presents it within the import-conformity process; (4) non-approved radio equipment can be blocked at the port of import. Passive luminaires are out of ANRT scope but still need the lighting safety and EMC conformity evidence.
gap.zh: 持有 SRRC 核准的中国智能灯具进入摩洛哥仍须另取 ANRT 核准——两套制度不互认且频率分配不同。差距：（1）ANRT 无线电核准是在照明安全与 EMC 发射证据之外的独立强制步骤；（2）无线模块的工作频段及发射功率须符合摩洛哥频率分配，制造商在沿用中国所用模块配置前应予确认；（3）ANRT 核准通常通过在摩进口商/本地代表办理，由其提交申请并纳入进口符合性流程；（4）未经核准的无线电设备可在进口口岸被拦截。被动灯具不在 ANRT 范围内，但仍需照明安全与 EMC 符合性证据。
gap.zht: 持有 SRRC 核准的中國智能燈具進入摩洛哥仍須另取 ANRT 核准——兩套制度不互認且頻率分配不同。差距：（1）ANRT 無線電核准是在照明安全與 EMC 發射證據之外的獨立強制步驟；（2）無線模組的工作頻段及發射功率須符合摩洛哥頻率分配，製造商在沿用中國所用模組配置前應予確認；（3）ANRT 核准通常通過在摩進口商/本地代表辦理，由其提交申請並納入進口符合性流程；（4）未經核准的無線電設備可在進口口岸被攔截。被動燈具不在 ANRT 範圍內，但仍需照明安全與 EMC 符合性證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for wireless products — ANRT radio approval / agrement required before a wireless-enabled luminaire is placed on the Moroccan market; arranged via the in-country importer; non-passive luminaires only
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for wireless products — SRRC type approval required for wireless-enabled luminaires sold in China

source.publisher: ANRT — Agence Nationale de Reglementation des Telecommunications (Morocco)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Wireless-enabled LED luminaires require ANRT radio type approval before Moroccan market placement, a distinct step beyond lighting safety and EMC-emissions evidence. A Chinese SRRC approval is not recognised by ANRT and frequency allocations differ, so confirm the radio module's bands/power against Moroccan allocations and arrange ANRT approval through the in-country importer. Passive (non-wireless) luminaires are out of ANRT scope.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 具备无线功能的 LED 灯具在投放摩洛哥市场前须取得 ANRT 无线电型号核准，这是在照明安全与 EMC 发射证据之外的独立步骤。中国 SRRC 核准不被 ANRT 认可且频率分配不同，故请对照摩洛哥频率分配确认无线模块的频段/功率，并通过在摩进口商办理 ANRT 核准。被动（无无线）灯具不在 ANRT 范围内。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 具備無線功能的 LED 燈具在投放摩洛哥市場前須取得 ANRT 無線電型號核准，這是在照明安全與 EMC 發射證據之外的獨立步驟。中國 SRRC 核准不被 ANRT 認可且頻率分配不同，故請對照摩洛哥頻率分配確認無線模組的頻段/功率，並通過在摩進口商辦理 ANRT 核准。被動（無無線）燈具不在 ANRT 範圍內。
